provenance.lidar_source: USGS LPC FL Miami-Dade D23 LID2024 — tile IDs USGS_LPC_FL_MiamiDade_D23_LID2024_*. Source CRS EPSG:3857 per hero-tile manifest; verify against full collection metadata.
provenance.footprint_source: Miami-Dade County GIS — Building Footprints (open_county). Portal: gis-mdc.opendata.arcgis.com. SOURCE field: P=photogrammetry, L=LiDAR, null=unknown.
provenance.address_source: Miami-Dade GeoAddress. Input CRS EPSG:3857. Key fields: HSE_NUM (house number), SNAME (street), MUNIC_NAME (city), ZIP (postcode).
provenance.license_notes: UNVERIFIED. Footprint license listed as open_data_terms_unconfirmed — commercial-use terms must be manually verified at gis-mdc.opendata.arcgis.com before license_status can be set to confirmed. Address terms not yet reviewed. See configs/miami.status.json.

pipeline_tunables._note: These fields are Miami-specific pipeline parameters. They do not belong in the city_config schema and will be moved to a separate contract in a future step (R6+). Preserved here to avoid data loss during the schema migration.

footprint_source_detail.note: Miami-Dade County Open Data Hub — ArcGIS Hub portal. License terms not machine-readable. Manually verify at gis-mdc.opendata.arcgis.com before setting production_allowed=true. SOURCE field values: P=photogrammetry, L=LiDAR, null=unknown.

open_portal_layers.label: Miami-Dade Brownfield Sites
open_portal_layers.notes: 115 brownfield sites in Miami-Dade. NAME is the site name string. portal_environmental_risk receives the site name for nearby buildings. production_allowed pending license confirmation.

open_portal_layers.label: Miami-Dade Active Building Permits
open_portal_layers.attribution: Miami-Dade County Regulatory and Economic Resources
open_portal_layers.notes: BPSTATUS: A=active, E=expired, F=finaled/completed. where clause limits to active permits only. 261K total permits county-wide; active subset is smaller. production_allowed pending license confirmation.
